creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 155789
Shell archive for games/stendhal-webstart

Stendhal is a 2D multiplayer online role-playing game. This package provides a shell script that simply launches Stendhal's Java Webstart application from its remote location. It also includes a desktop menu entry and icon for launching from X11 desktops menu.

This package is for those that don't care to build the complete source code found in games/stendhal, but would rather just launch the pre-compiled remote client webstart.

Java 6+ and icedtea-web are required.
